---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - 2026 (expected).

# Work Experience

Currently no full-time employment.

## Internships

1.  Renault Mais A.Ş., Aftersales Department Intern, Ankara, 2024.

2.  ICRON Technologies, Platform Development Intern, Ankara, 2025.

# Projects

1.  Production Time Estimation for Custom Steel Pole Manufacturing, Mitaş Poligon Project, 2026.

# Competencies

R, Git, Quarto, Data Analysis, Operations Research, Optimization

# Hobbies

Team Sports, Chess
